title: GEEPAS Steam Iron | Clothes Dry & Steam Press | 35s Fast Heat-Up, Vertical Steaming | Nonstick Soleplate & Adjustable Temperature | 210ml Water Tank with 0.5g/Steam Output | 2 Year Warranty 1750W Grey
features: ✅ POWERFUL 1750W PERFORMANCE, FAST HEAT-UP – The Geepas Steam irons deliver quick 35 seconds heat-up and efficient ironing. It ensures faster crease removal, making ironing effortless and saving time on busy mornings.

✅ NONSTICK SOLEPLATE – The flat iron is equipped with a nonstick soleplate, iron steamer glides seamlessly over all fabric types without snagging or burning. The thick soleplate ensures even heat distribution for a professional finish.

✅ ADJUSTABLE TEMPERATURE, VARIABLE STEAM CONTROL – Lightweight steam irons feature a customizable thermostat dial to suit fabrics like cotton, silk, linen, wool, and synthetics. Choose from continuous steam (16g/min) or steam burst (0.5g/min) for stubborn creases.

✅ LARGE 210ML WATER TANK, POWERFUL STEAM OUTPUT – Equipped with a 210ml water tank, this steam iron ensures long ironing sessions. Delivers a continuous steam flow of 16g/min and a steam boost of 0.5g/min, effectively removing stubborn creases for crisp, professional results.

✅ SAFETY & SELF-CLEANING FUNCTION – The heat-resistant, shockproof ergonomic handle ensures a secure grip, making ironing comfortable and safe. The built-in self-cleaning function helps prevent limescale buildup, maintaining optimal performance and extending the iron’s lifespan.
description: Product Description POWERFUL STEAM BURST Provides precision steaming across small and large garments and steam boost for tough creases. VARIVABLE TEAMPERATURE CONTROL You can easily adjust the temperature according to the fabric type by moving the rotatable temperature control. CERAMIC SOLEPLATE The Ceramic plate will ensure a smooth and soft glide of the iron over the fabric. 210ML WATER TANK Large water tank capacity, Filling it completely, you can iron a large number of clothes without adding extra water. VERTICAL STEAM, 20G/MIN CONTINUOUS STEAM Steam garments vertically or use to freshen upholstery, curtains and bedding. Penetrates deeper into fabrics to easily remove stubborn creases. Ideal for getting creases out of curtains, hanging garments and upholstery.

specifications_table.Special Features: ‎Continuous Steam Technology, Non-Stick Soleplate, Steam Boost Function, Temperature Control
